name: @bybrave/async-retry2
description: Maintained async-retry fork: zero runtime dependencies, ESM + CommonJS, built-in TypeScript types, bail actually stops retries, AbortSignal + shouldRetry support. Drop-in for async-retry.

scripts.test-types: tsc --strict --noEmit --moduleResolution bundler --target es2020 --lib es2020,dom --types node test/types.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm test && npm run test-types

author: bybrave
